# Causal Discovery

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Causal discovery algorithms and their assumptions

_To be added._

## Constraint-based causal discovery

_To be added._

## Score/model-based causal discovery

_To be added._

## Hybrid methods

_To be added._

## Examples

_To be added._
